title: salix nummularia subsp. pauciflora
intro: Salix nummularia subsp. pauciflora, also known as the narrow-leaved willow, is a plant species in the Salicaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, due to the presence of salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix nummularia subsp. pauciflora include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
